subject: Charged twice this month?!
body: Hi, I just checked my bank statement and I was charged $49 twice on July 3rd. I only have one subscription. Please fix this — I've been billed wrong before and it's getting frustrating.

subject: Requesting a refund for order #4471
body: Hello, I ordered the Pro plan last week but it turns out it doesn't have the export feature I needed. I'd like a refund please. Order #4471, purchased July 8. Thanks for understanding.

subject: URGENT: dashboard completely down
body: Our whole team cannot access the dashboard since about 7am. We are getting a 503 error on every page. This is critical — we use this for dispatch and we are losing money every hour it's down. Please respond ASAP.

subject: You folks are amazing
body: Just wanted to say thank you to your support team — Priya helped me migrate all my data last week and stayed on the call way past what I expected. Love the product, love the people. Keep it up!

subject: You have been selected — act now
body: Congratulations! You are the WINNER of our exclusive crypto giveaway. Limited time offer — click the link below to claim your prize before midnight. Unsubscribe at any time.

subject: Feature request: dark mode
body: Hi team, I use the app late at night and it would be great if you could please add a dark mode. Not urgent at all, just a suggestion — I'd use it every day. Cheers!

subject: App crashes when uploading CSV over 10MB
body: Steps to reproduce: go to Imports, choose a CSV bigger than about 10MB, hit upload. The app shows a spinner then crashes back to the home screen. Happens every time on Chrome and Edge. Started after last week's update I think.

subject: How do I add a second user to my account?
body: Hi, quick question — is it possible to add my business partner as a second user on my existing plan, or do we need to upgrade? Couldn't find this in the help docs. Thanks!

subject: Invoice #20458 shows wrong company name
body: Hello, our June invoice (#20458) is addressed to 'Fernwood Cate' instead of 'Fernwood Cafe'. Our accountant needs a corrected invoice for tax purposes. Could you re-issue it with the right name?

subject: This is unacceptable
body: Third time contacting you. My sync has been broken for two weeks, nobody has replied to my last two emails, and I'm paying for a service that doesn't work. Honestly the worst support experience I've had. Fix it or I want my money back.

subject: Wondering about API access
body: Hi! I'm a developer at a small nonprofit. Do you offer API access on the Starter plan, and if so where can I find the docs? Also wondering if there's a nonprofit discount. Thanks so much!

subject: Guaranteed ranking on page 1
body: Dear website owner, we noticed your site is not ranking. Our SEO services offer guaranteed ranking with limited time offer pricing. Act now and get 70% off. Reply to unsubscribe.

subject: Payment failed but card is fine
body: My payment failed this morning and my account shows 'past due', but my card works everywhere else and has plenty of balance. Can you check on your end? I don't want to lose access — I have a client demo tomorrow so this is fairly urgent.

subject: Small praise + a tiny suggestion
body: Loving the new reports feature — genuinely saved me hours this week. One tiny suggestion: any plans to let us schedule reports to email themselves weekly? That would make it perfect. Thanks for the great work!

subject: Cannot access account after password reset
body: After resetting our office manager's password, she cannot access the account at all — it says 'account locked' now. We need this sorted today if possible, as payroll info is in there. Phone: (555) 014-2298 if easier.
